src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-integration-001 title: end-to-end flow: user posts fridge, another user chats about it module: integration (post/chat) source files or pages: 1, 2, 3 covered methods: preconditions: - users `"user1"` and `"user2"` exist. - both are logged in. test data: test steps: 1. **post creation:** - user1 creates a fridge post with `cost=10`. - post is saved to firebase with `id=2001`. 2. **chat initiation:** - user2 views the post and clicks "message seller." - data organizer creates a chat between `user1` and `user2` with `id=1002`. 3. **message exchange:** - user2 sends a message: `"can i buy it for $8?"` - message is saved to `/chats/1002/messages/5002`. 4. **product removal:** - user1 accepts offer and removes 1 item from fridge. - `qty_int` updates from `5` to `4`. expected result: - all entities (post, chat, message, fridge) are created/updated in firebase. - ui reflects changes in real-time for both users. - no conflicts or missing data. unit: project:
